description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pre-Release that runs on push to the master branch. The workflow should only run for the django-commons repository owner and checks if the version in django_prometheus/__init__.py contains 'dev'. If so, it sets up Python 3.9, installs dependencies, updates the version number from Git, builds the package, and publishes it to PyPI using the pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish action.
